title: Conditional Colour Formatting on Dashboard Table Widget
excerpt:
Could we please have the Conditional Colour Formatting option available on the Dashboard Table widget? 
Alternatively, can we please have the option for Conditional Colour Formatting made available on the Main Table view…

posts.author: Stephanie2 (Stephanie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could we please have the Conditional Colour Formatting option available on the Dashboard Table widget?

Alternatively, can we please have the option for Conditional Colour Formatting made available on the Main Table view of a Table and have this flow through to the Dashboard Table Widget?

Losing the conditional colour formatting makes it more difficult to read data on the Dashboards than if it was available like it is within the Tables themselves. Thank you
